query: ok i wanna add a feature where users can save fountains into custom lists like 'my running route'. before you touch any code, ask me whatever you need to nail down the design
help me plan offline mode for the map. feels like there are a bunch of decisions we need to make first
grill me on my idea: a weekly email digest of new fountains added near the user
i'm about to refactor the community voting system but i'm not sure about a few things — can you ask me some questions before we dive in?
thinking about migrating favorites from asyncstorage to mmkv. plan it out but check the tradeoffs with me first
before we implement dark mode, what are the key choices i should be making? give me options with pros and cons
i have a rough idea for push notifications but it's half-baked. poke holes in it and help me figure out the right approach before i start coding
design review pls — my plan for letting users submit photos of fountains. what could go wrong and what do i need to decide
what do you need to know from me before building the toilet-finder filters?
stress-test this plan before i build it: cache all WFS data on first launch so the app works fully offline underground
just add a console.log in useFountainsData so i can see the raw WFS response coming back
the ios build is failing with a 'duplicate symbol' error on the maplibre pod, help me fix it
does haversineDistance in map/utils.ts return meters or kilometers? just need to know
write me a plan for my product launch marketing campaign next month — channels, timeline, the whole thing
rename the ToggleBar component to DatasetToggle everywhere it's used
review my open PR and tell me if the clustering logic has any bugs
help me grill my coworker with tough mock-interview questions for his system design interview tomorrow
explain how the deep linking works in this app, i forgot how i wired up the berlinpublic:// scheme
make a checklist of everything left before we can ship v1.2 to the play store
i already decided everything — just implement the broken-fountain reporting exactly as we discussed: add a reason field, a third status, color the markers. go
